description: Controlled reference-data package for Basel III final reforms.

baseline.source_document: Basel III: Finalising post-crisis reforms, December 2017

jurisdictions.name: Swiss FINMA / Capital Adequacy Ordinance implementation

quality_gates_before_production: Reconcile every table against binding legal text and regulator rulebook.
Reconcile ECAI mappings and external rating eligibility rules.
Confirm bank-specific supervisory permissions and model approvals.
Sign off national discretions, transition calendars and reporting templates.
Freeze validation hash for each approved reference-data version.
